rows.label: qev051503_MSG0001
rows.name:
Fufu, Drongo Caravan... No!
Lulirita, strongest warrior of
the Nopon, has arrived, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051503_MSG0002
rows.name:
I came here today to teach you who is
the strongest on this planet, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051503_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Eh? You're asking if
Lulirita is going to fight?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051503_MSG0004
rows.name:
I can't do anything outrageous like that,
mo! What would I do if I got hurt?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051503_MSG0005
rows.name:
The ones who will fight are the
rough-and-tumble Nopohippo army that
Lulirita spent a lot of money raising, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051503_MSG0006
rows.name:
Here we go, mo! Lulirita will be...
watching from a safe place up high, mo~![ST:wait ]
